title: Xu Yun
content:
Xu Yun
 is a member of the 
Origin Sect
 and the most favored disciple of 
Lu Yanfei
.

Appearance
[
]

She is quite beautiful but what makes her even more attractive is her gentle temperament and delicate features.

History
[
]

In an attempt to breakthrough to the 
Corporeal Yang
 stage, she ingested a 
Soul Parting Death Pill
 which would have led to her death if not for the help of 
Wang Lin
.
